name: 印花 | jabbi | 2023年巴黎锦标赛
nameZh: 印花 | jabbi | 2023年巴黎锦标赛
collection: 2023年巴黎锦标赛传奇组亲笔签名胶囊
collectionZh: 2023年巴黎锦标赛传奇组亲笔签名胶囊
descriptionEn: This item commemorates the BLAST.tv Paris 2023 CS:GO Championship. This sticker can be applied to any weapon you own and can be scraped to look more worn. You can scrape the same sticker multiple times, making it a bit more worn each time, until it is removed from the weapon.This sticker was autographed by professional player Jakob Nygaard playing for Heroic at the BLAST.tv Paris 2023 CS:GO Major Championship.
descriptionZh: 该物品用于纪念 2023年 BLAST.tv 巴黎 CS:GO 锦标赛。 这张印花可以应用在您所拥有的任何武器上，您也可以刮掉它，使其显得更为老旧。您可以多次刮除同一张印花，刮得次数越多，磨损程度越大。直到您将其完全从武器上刮去为止。这张印花由来自 Heroic 战队的职业选手 Jakob Nygaard 亲笔签名，他是此次2023年 BLAST.tv 巴黎锦标赛选手。
